name: Set up a Weight-based Shipping Option
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up the Shipping Option"}], "data-id": "1"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To charge for shipping in weight bands:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Shipping", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Shipping Options", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Create shipping option", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Set my own pricing", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the Advanced Options section, click the "}, {"text": "Weight or size", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select a "}, {"text": "Where to ship", "bold": true}, {"text": " option.
